languages.text: {n}Мелкие растения, оплетшие усыпальницу, с тихим чавканьем рвутся, когда вы сдвигаете удивительно легкую крышку. Вашему взору открывается зияющая пустота внутри саркофага. Тела вашего предка тут нет, как и его легендарного меча.{/n}

{n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Мелкие растения, оплетшие усыпальницу, с тихим чавканьем рвутся, когда вы сдвигаете удивительно легкую крышку. Вашему взору открывается зияющая пустота внутри саркофага. Тела вашего предка тут нет, как и его легендарного меча.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with a soft, wet squelch as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside it you see nothing but a gaping void. There is neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword in the tomb.{/n}

{n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with a soft, wet squelch as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside it you see nothing but a gaping void. There is neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword in the tomb.{/n}

{n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}

{n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}当你掀开那个轻得出奇的棺盖时，附着在石棺上的小型植物纷纷断裂，发出轻柔湿软的嘎吱声。石棺内部空空如也，既没有你先祖的遗体，也没有那把传说之剑。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}当你掀开那个轻得出奇的棺盖时，附着在石棺上的小型植物纷纷断裂，发出轻柔湿软的嘎吱声。石棺内部空空如也，既没有你先祖的遗体，也没有那把传说之剑。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lahde tutunan küçük bitkiler, şaşırtıcı derecede hafif olan kapağı hareket ettirdiğinde yumuşak, ıslak şapırtılarla kopuyor. İçeride kocaman bir boşluktan başka bir şey görmüyorsun. Lahitte ne atanın bedeni ne de efsanevi kılıcı var.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lahde tutunan küçük bitkiler, şaşırtıcı derecede hafif olan kapağı hareket ettirdiğinde yumuşak, ıslak şapırtılarla kopuyor. İçeride kocaman bir boşluktan başka bir şey görmüyorsun. Lahitte ne atanın bedeni ne de efsanevi kılıcı var.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les plantes qui s'accrochent au sarcophage se cassent en produisant des petits craquements humides lorsque vous retirez le couvercle étonnamment léger. À l'intérieur, vous ne découvrez que du vide. Ni le corps de votre ancêtre ni son épée légendaire ne sont là.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les plantes qui s'accrochent au sarcophage se cassent en produisant des petits craquements humides lorsque vous retirez le couvercle étonnamment léger. À l'intérieur, vous ne découvrez que du vide. Ni le corps de votre ancêtre ni son épée légendaire ne sont là.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las pequeñas plantas que se aferran al sarcófago se rompen con ruidos húmedos y suaves cuando mueves la tapa, sorprendentemente ligera. En el interior no hay nada. Ni el cadáver de tu antepasado ni su legendaria espada están en el sarcófago.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las pequeñas plantas que se aferran al sarcófago se rompen con ruidos húmedos y suaves cuando mueves la tapa, sorprendentemente ligera. En el interior no hay nada. Ni el cadáver de tu antepasado ni su legendaria espada están en el sarcófago.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die kleinen Pflanzen, die an dem Sarcophagus haften, reißen mit einem leisen Schmatzen ab, als du den überraschend leichten Deckel bewegst. Im Inneren des Sarcophagus entdeckst du nur eine gähnende Leere. Er enthält weder den Leichnam deines Ahnherren, noch sein legendäres Schwert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die kleinen Pflanzen, die an dem Sarcophagus haften, reißen mit einem leisen Schmatzen ab, als du den überraschend leichten Deckel bewegst. Im Inneren des Sarcophagus entdeckst du nur eine gähnende Leere. Er enthält weder den Leichnam deines Ahnherren, noch sein legendäres Schwert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}石棺にしがみつく小さな植物が、あなたが意外なほど軽い蓋を動かすと、柔らかく湿った音を立ててちぎれる。中には、ぽっかりと空いた虚ろのほか、何も見当たらない。あなたの祖先の遺体も、その伝説の剣も、石棺の中には横たわっていない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The small plants clinging to the sarcophagus snap with soft, wet squelches as you move a surprisingly light lid. Inside, you see nothing but a gaping hollow. Neither your ancestor's body nor his legendary sword lie in the sarcophagus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}石棺にしがみつく小さな植物が、あなたが意外なほど軽い蓋を動かすと、柔らかく湿った音を立ててちぎれる。中には、ぽっかりと空いた虚ろのほか、何も見当たらない。あなたの祖先の遺体も、その伝説の剣も、石棺の中には横たわっていない。{/n}
